name: French Dip Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the beef chuck roast in a slow cooker.
2. Add water, soy sauce, and seasonings.
3. Cover and cook on high for 5-6 hours or until beef is tender.
4. Remove meat from broth; shred with fork and keep warm.
5. Strain broth; skim off fat.
6. Serve shredded beef on split french rolls.
7. Pour broth into small cups for dipping.
